subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Though thou hast departed, I have not forgotten thee, and through the grace and bounty of the Most Great Name, I cherish the hope that the counsels [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق رفتی و ترا فراموش ننمودم و از فضل و کرم اسم اعظم امیدوارم که نصائح
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
